subcodes.first_line: O ye two brothers, one spirit in two bodies! Praise be to God for physical and spiritual, bodily and celestial brotherhood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر یک روح در دو پیکر الحمد لله اخوت جسمانی و معنوی و جسدی و روحانی در
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
